data.chapter_title_en: vocation for someone who says: May Allah forgive you
data.english_text: (AAabdullah Ibn Sarjis  said: ‘I went to see the Prophet  and ate from his food and then said to him: (May Allah forgive you, O Messenger of Allah.) he  replied: (and you.))

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (AAabdullah Ibn Sarjis  said: ‘I went to see the Prophet  and ate from his food and then said to him:(Ghafaral-lahu laka ya rasoolal-lah.) he  replied: (wa-lak))
